step_rationale: Lipid-breakdown product elevated in ACS; marker of systemic lipolysis and ischemic metabolic stress.
mechanism: Glycerol elevation reflects acute lipid mobilization and ischemia-driven metabolic perturbation in ACS.

references.title: GC-MS validation and analysis of targeted plasma metabolites related to carbonyl stress in type 2 diabetes mellitus patients with and without acute coronary syndrome.
